content.en:
The Secret Sword Dao Ancestor was on the run, and behind him was the invincible True Ancestor of the Black Wind Mountain, the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor.

The Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor has never left the Huoyan Forbidden Land, after all, he has finally come here, and if he does not have enough income, he will naturally not leave easily.

And this time, he also valued the ability of the Haotian Emperor Mirror, if he could use the Haotian Emperor Mirror to evolve the path of the Half-Step Domain Ancestor, then he would have the hope of entering the realm of the Half-Step Domain Ancestor.

No matter how powerful the Invincible Dao Ancestor was, he was far from being the opponent of the Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and the gap in strength between the two sides was even greater than the gap between the Invincible True Ancestor and the Supreme True Ancestor.

A half-step domain ancestor can easily pinch an invincible Dao Ancestor to death.

For example, the three palace masters of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, their orders, those emperors did not dare to disobey at all, just because the difference in strength was too big.

It's just that it is too difficult for the Invincible Dao Ancestor to impact the half-step domain ancestor realm.

This time, the Invincible Dao Ancestors had come down for a long time, just to find the hope of entering the half-step domain ancestor with the help of the Haotian Emperor Mirror, so they would do whatever it takes.

Nowadays, the True Ancestors have been killed too much, and many True Ancestors are hiding, and if they are killed one by one, the speed is too slow.

Therefore, the invincible Dao Ancestors were eyeing the strongest Dao Ancestors.

When the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor saw the Secret Sword Dao Ancestor, he was naturally unwilling to let him go.

"Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor, I have no grudge against you, I am willing to give you all my treasures, how about you surround my life?"

There was no way, he couldn't beat the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor at all, and now he was seriously injured.

As for using the Heavenly Sword Sect to threaten the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor?

Don't be funny, the Heavenly Sword Sect is only the Eightfold Heavenly Force, he is the strongest combat power of the Heavenly Sword Sect, what threat does he use to Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor?

"No need, your treasures are rubbish to me!" Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor said coldly: "I just want your life!"

Rumble!!!

The Secret Sword Dao Ancestor was covered by an endless sea of fire, and every wisp of flame was filled with the ultimate Dao fire, representing the ultimate of the Great Dao of Fire, and its power could be imagined how terrifying it was.

The Secret Sword Dao Ancestor turned into a sword and wanted to rush out.

However, the Extreme Dao Fire turned into a chain of rules that bound the Secret Sword Dao Ancestor, making it impossible for him to escape at all.

The gap in strength between the two sides is a bit big, and it is not a level at all.

If it hadn't been suppressed, the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor wouldn't have needed a few moves to kill the Secret Sword Dao Ancestor, and now the Secret Sword Dao Ancestor was able to resist for so long because it had occupied the strength of the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor and couldn't exert it.

After another while, the Secret Sword Dao Ancestor really couldn't hold on.

Click!

The body of the Secret Sword Dao Ancestor was shattered little by little, and the soul that was as strong as a Dao weapon was also shattered like a broken porcelain, and it turned into a point of light and disappeared little by little.

Blood rained from the sky, and the avenue screamed.

The Secret Sword Dao Ancestor has fallen!

The Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor put away the body of the Secret Sword Dao Ancestor and quickly left here.

Huoyan tabooly.

Ye Tian looked at the rule sorrow in the void now, blood rain fell on the ground everywhere, and he understood that this was a supreme Dao Ancestor who had fallen, and a silver long sword and a slightly familiar figure appeared in the sorrow of the Great Dao, and he could recognize the identity of the other party.

Heavenly Sword Sect's Secret Sword Dao Ancestor!

"The Secret Sword Dao Ancestor has fallen, it's a pity!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He and the Heavenly Sword Sect are enemies, but he also has to admit that the luck of the Heavenly Sword Sect is not very good, the last time the Changfeng Sword Venerable snatched the forbidden treasure and was besieged and killed, this time he fell a supreme Dao Ancestor.

Now, the strength of the Heavenly Sword Sect can be described as a great drop.

The fall of a supreme Dao Ancestor also made Ye Tian realize how dangerous Huoyan Forbidden Land was now, not to mention that the True Ancestor would die at any time, even if the Supreme Dao Ancestor was not careful, he would die.

Next, Ye Tian and Ouyang Jiu'er were more careful.

But unfortunately, it is impossible to pick up the corpse at this time.

Everyone knows that the corpse can be sacrificed to the Haotian Emperor Mirror, so as to evolve the future path, how can it be possible to kill people and leave a corpse?

Ouyang Jiu'er and Ye Tian were not in a hurry to go to the Haotian Emperor Mirror, maybe there was still an invincible Dao Ancestor squatting there, if they went now, wouldn't they be caught in the net?

Those Invincible Dao Ancestors didn't mind killing the two of them, robbing them of the Forbidden Treasure and the corpses they had collected, and even sacrificing both of them.

......

Immortal True Kingdom.

This is the true kingdom of the Immortal Gate.

Originally, the Immortal True Kingdom was peaceful, but on this day, a figure tore through the world barrier of the Immortal True Kingdom and descended here.

He, the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor of the Eightfold Heavenly Power Heavenly Demon Sect - Force Demon Dao Ancestor!

At this time, the Force Demon Dao Ancestor looked at the countless lives of the Immortal True Kingdom, and couldn't help but smile cruelly: "It's too dangerous to hunt the True Ancestor in the Huoyan Forbidden Land, and you will be hunted by someone if you are not careful! It is better to plunder the lives of the True Realm in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and then find a suitable opportunity to enter the Ancient Mirror Forbidden Supreme Treasure when no one is around, sacrifice your life, and evolve the future path! I don't believe that those invincible Dao Ancestors and Supreme Dao Ancestors will stay there for the rest of their lives?"

The ancient mirror forbidden treasure cannot be taken away, and it is impossible for the strongest Dao Ancestors and the invincible Dao Ancestors to stay forever.

Thus, it gave him hope.

It's a big deal to collect a lot of lives first, then go back to sleep, and then find a chance to go out again.

The reason why he was looking for the Immortal True Kingdom was because he happened to be nearby, and the Immortal True Kingdom did not have an invincible True Ancestor, so no one could stop him.

Swish!

The Force Demon Dao Ancestor came to a starry sky continent, and with a wave of his hand, countless lives flew into the body world of the Force Demon Dao Ancestor like ants.

In this way, all the lives on the Starry Sky Continent were plundered by him, including many True Monarchs and weaker True Ancestors.

Soon, the actions of the Force Demon Dao Ancestor were discovered.

A large number of True Ancestors wanted to besiege the Force Demon Dao Ancestor, but the strongest Immortal Sect, which was only the strongest Dao Ancestor, was not the opponent of the Force Demon Dao Ancestor at all, and the True Ancestors fell and died one by one, and the losses were extremely heavy.

Thereupon.

The Immortal Gate began to ask for help, asking for help from the other forces of the Temple of the Gods.

A true ancestor of the Immortal Sect even asked for the Moon Shooting True Ancestor of the Void Heaven True Ancestor, and the Moon Shooting True Ancestor found Ye Tian.

Terran.

The Void Heaven Palace's Moon Shooting True Ancestor came to visit Ye Tian, this time he listened to Ye Tian's advice and did not go to the Huoyan Forbidden Land, and now that he heard about the situation in the Huoyan Forbidden Land, he didn't dare to go.

Soon, Ye Tian came out.

"Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor!" said the Moon Shooting True Ancestor respectfully.

"What's the matter?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Moon Shooting True Ancestor hurriedly told the matter of the Force Demon Dao Ancestor, and asked the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor for help.

"Force Demon Dao Ancestor plundered the life of the Immortal True Kingdom!"

As soon as Ye Tian heard it, he understood the plan of the Force Demon Dao Ancestor, it was clear that he was using a large amount of life to sacrifice to the Haotian Emperor Mirror, which was also a way, but it required too many lives.

Moreover, he was sure that there might be many Dao Ancestors who would also have this plan.

Of course.

The Dao Ancestors had not stayed in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm for a long time, and they did not dare to stay for a long time, so it was impossible for them to plunder too many lives.

But if they are allowed to plunder, I am afraid that more than half of a true kingdom will be abolished.

Moreover, the Immortal True Kingdom is not very far away from the Void Heaven True Kingdom, if he doesn't care, maybe some Dao Ancestors are a little more bold and will come to the Void Heaven True Kingdom to plunder their lives.

So, Ye Tian made a decision.

He wants to kill a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor today to shock the Quartet, lest an ignorant Dao Ancestor come to seek death!

"Okay, I promise!"

Ye Tianying said.

"Thank you Wanfa Dao Ancestor!" the Moon Shooting True Ancestor thanked.

"Let's go, otherwise I'm afraid that the Force Demon Dao Ancestor will run away!" Ye Tian took the Moon Shooting True Ancestor and shuttled to the Immortal True Kingdom at the fastest speed.

-------------

"Hahahaha, it's too easy! True Ancestors alone have killed tens of thousands, and ordinary lives have plundered I don't know how many trillions, this speed is much faster than in Huoyan Forbidden Land, and it is too much safer. Here, no one is my opponent!Do those garbage Dao Ancestors of the Immortal True Kingdom dare to come, and they are also looking for death!"

The Force Demon Dao Ancestor laughed wildly.

Abrupt.

A wisp of breath passed through, making him feel a great threat.

Click!

The void cracked, and Ye Tian walked out of it.

"Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, it's you!"

The Force Demon Dao Ancestor had a hint of jealousy.

After all, Ye Tian is a supreme true ancestor, and his strength is not weak, so he can't kill Ye Tian.

However, he didn't know that Ye Tian's strength this time was much stronger than the last time, and it was already comparable to the weakened Supreme Dao Ancestor.

Force Demon Dao Ancestor didn't want to entangle with Ye Tian, after all, he had been in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm for a long time, and in a few more minutes, he was afraid that his strength would be reduced.

He didn't dare to go down with Ye Tian, otherwise he would be the one who suffered, and he would fall if he wasn't careful.

I saw that the Force Demon Dao Ancestor turned into a black light and was about to flee into the air, but Ye Tian cast a forbidden realm and instantly restrained him.

At this time, the expression of the Force Demon Dao Ancestor changed greatly!
